releaseNotes: Fix: a Fire TV Stick measured at only 1.7GB total RAM showed missing My List poster art, UI freezes, and a Live TV crash in the same session - all symptoms of memory pressure. Image cache now uses 10% of available memory instead of ~20-25%. Fix: the persistent live-player controller (built to keep a mini-preview alive on the Guide screen) was only released when landing back on Hub - My List, Movies, TV Shows, and Search are all reachable directly without passing through Hub, so a live channel could keep decoding invisibly in the background the whole time an image-heavy catalog screen was open. Those four screens now close any stale live session on entry. Fix: multichannel (5.1/7.1) movies/shows crashed - Media3's own ChannelMixingAudioProcessor class was the actual broken component on this hardware, replaced with our own hand-rolled downmix (the same approach TiviMate's own code takes).
